title: Moments and Equilibrium of Rigid Bodies
description: The turning effect of a force, the principle of moments for a rigid body in equilibrium, and combined force-and-moment problems for rods, beams and ladders.
objectives: Define the moment of a force as F × d and give its unit, the newton metre
Apply the principle of moments to a rigid body in rotational equilibrium
Use the centre of mass of a uniform rod (its midpoint) in moments problems
Combine force equilibrium and moment equilibrium to find unknown reactions on a beam or rod with two supports
Analyse a ladder resting against a smooth wall on rough ground, including the minimum coefficient of friction for equilibrium

lessons.title: Rigid bodies in equilibrium: combining forces and moments
A stretch topic: the ladder problem
